purpose: Operate one governed XRP/HBAR Apex Intelligence OS with shared control, evidence, tools, APIs, memory and verification while preserving separate XRP and HBAR asset domains.

architecture.instruction_plane: Unified inheritance rules, triggers, safety, tool and cost routing.
architecture.registry_plane: Asset profiles, sources, claims, milestones, forecasts, risks, agents, integrations, tests, evidence and decisions.
architecture.execution_plane: Hub-owned workers, schedulers, queues, source adapters, calculations, reports and alerts.
architecture.verification_plane: Jarvis-build independent source, schema, calculation, security, cost, deployment and rollback checks.
architecture.media_plane: Videotranscribe-owned media intake, transcription, timestamped claims and evidence delivery.

rules: additions-only evolution with source lineage and superseded-not-deleted history
source-first current verification and explicit source denominator
separate user requirements, assistant proposals, external claims, implementation and runtime evidence
use universal evidence-backed status vocabulary only
separate network or company adoption from direct token demand
separate unconditional probability, scenario-consistency and trigger-activation scores
record capital-flow pathway, counterfactual alternatives and invalidation for material adoption claims
free/local/deterministic routing before paid models or tools
least privilege, secret references only, redacted logs and approval gates
idempotency, bounded retries, timeouts, dead-letter handling and rollback
no agent or module self-certification; independent verification required
voice and UI never bypass MFA, credentials, financial, destructive or production approvals
every durable output maps to Knowledge Fabric with provenance, freshness, conflict and supersession metadata

shared_agents.role: Decompose UPDATE, DEEP_SCAN and ALL_INTELLIGENCE, enforce dependency, budget and approval policy.
Discover official, primary, technical, regulatory, market, chain, media and adverse sources without padding counts.
Hash, timestamp, classify, deduplicate and preserve every accepted source and negative result.
Verify claims, preserve contradictions and apply freshness and authority tiers.
Map actor, required token, mechanism, volume, velocity, liquidity, float and alternatives.
Evaluate liquidity, float, supply, unlocks, fees, staking, chain usage and market structure.
Track official regulation, filings, funds, custody, banks, enterprises and policy changes.
Route videos, podcasts and social claims through timestamped evidence extraction.
Maintain milestone scenarios, probabilities, conditions, timing and outcome calibration.
Calculate credible, high-adoption, extreme-tail, mechanical and incoherent price regions.
Find adverse evidence, failure modes, competitor substitution and thesis invalidators.
Compare current outputs with prior values, explanations and historical claims.
Write append-only, schema-valid evidence and derived records to the approved backend.
Recompute denominators, critical calculations, source mappings and evidence chains.
Render novice-first status, evidence, uncertainty, blockers and recommended actions.
Approve repository or staging state only after tests, evidence and rollback proof; production remains owner-gated.

xrp_domain.milestone_ceiling: fixed milestones through USD 10,000 plus evidence-labelled dynamic scenarios above it
xrp_domain.non_transferable_rule: Ripple company success, RLUSD usage or XRPL activity cannot be counted as XRP demand without an evidenced XRP capital-flow mechanism.

hbar_domain.milestone_ceiling: fixed milestones through USD 100 plus evidence-labelled dynamic scenarios above it
hbar_domain.non_transferable_rule: Council membership, transaction counts or enterprise pilots cannot be counted as HBAR demand without measured fees, staking, liquidity, holdings or other value capture.

tool_api_policy.rule: All approved tools, APIs and skills inherit the shared controls, but are selected by capability and asset applicability rather than invoked blindly.

completion_chain: Requirement -> Agent/Module -> Artifact -> Test/Waiver -> Evidence -> Runtime state -> Rollback -> Owner acceptance
runtime_truth: The unified governance and registry contract is implemented in jarvis-build. Connected adapters, persistent Knowledge Fabric, authenticated UI and local speech still require staging and runtime proof.
rollback: Revert the framework tranche; prior independent XRP/HBAR profiles and historical matrix remain preserved.
